<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Key nodes:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] > 1 or n['color'] in ['M', 'p', 'W', 'G', 'w']:
        print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={n['boundary'][:6]}...")

# Check for magenta pixels
magenta_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'M']
print(f"\nMagenta nodes: {len(magenta_nodes)}")
for n in magenta_nodes:
    print(f"  id={n['id']} at boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check the bottom area
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nBottom area (rows 48-63):")
for i in range(48, 64):
    row_str = ascii_lines[i][25:44]
    if 'p' in row_str or 'M' in row_str or 'W' in row_str or 'G' in row_str or 'w' in row_str:
        print(f"  {i}: {row_str}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
